title: Ja9Xr2Is43Etm19Efflv9Xqvfcfhpu
summary:
Main
By Michalis Voutsinas
As the star performer of the twenty-eighth trading week, the Baltic Panamax index posted an impressive 8.6 percent weekly gain, reaching $15,106 per day. After hitting five-month lows on Monday, the Panamax sector rebounded strongly, trending decisively upward for the remainder of the week. Similarly, the Baltic Supramax index climbed to $15,004 per day by Friday's close, having balanced at onemonth lows earlier in the week.
